reviews.comment:
Super agradecidos como turistas. Tuvimos que quedarnos varias horas allí por el corte de ruta 154 y nos atendieron genial!!! Super atentos  los playeros informando lo sucedido y dando tranquilidad ante la espera. Gracias gracias!!!!

(Translated by Google)
We are incredibly grateful as tourists. We had to stay there for several hours due to the closure of Route 154, and the service was fantastic! The beach attendants were very attentive, keeping us informed about the situation and reassuring us during the wait. Thank you, thank you!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURRd3JTQXpRRRAB

reviewer.displayName: Ricardo C. Larrondo CC RNFS División Kilo

reviews.comment:
Hola la primera ves q cierran la playa 20"min la  de expendio para cargar los tanques de un camion

(Translated by Google)
Hello, this is the first time they've closed the beach for 20 minutes, the one where they sell gas to fill the tanks of a truck.

reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio como en toda ypf y mucho más si es del automóvil club.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, as is typical of YPF, and even more so if it's the Automobile Club.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4MExpNS1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente habitacion y lugar para hacer un párate de viaje largo, todo muy limpio y ordenado

(Translated by Google)
Excellent room and place to stop over for a long trip, everything very clean and tidy.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNReWYyaVFBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio y atencion, baños y lugar muy limpios. Personal muy amable, cargamos combustible y tomamos y riquisimo cafe con tostados y alfajores.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and attention, very clean bathrooms and location. Very friendly staff. We filled up with gas and had delicious coffee with toasted bread and alfajores.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRM3RQMHBBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para los viajeros y no duden en reservar. La habitación no es grande pero muy bien equipada y muy cómoda. Descansamos muy bien y a la mañana siguiente desayunamos super bien para seguir viaje. El año próximo seguro voy a volver a reservar ahí cuando viaje al sur.

(Translated by Google)
An excellent place for travelers, so don't hesitate to book. The room isn't large, but it's very well-equipped and very comfortable. We rested well and had a delicious breakfast the next morning before continuing our journey. I'll definitely book there again next year when I travel south.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRM0puVnRBRRAB
